query:
-- Verificar o ID do endereço REC-01-A
SELECT id, code, tenantId, status, zoneId
FROM warehouseLocations
WHERE code = 'REC-01-A';

-- Verificar se há múltiplos endereços com o código REC-01-A (multi-tenant)
SELECT id, code, tenantId, status, zoneId
FROM warehouseLocations
WHERE code LIKE 'REC%'
ORDER BY tenantId;
